metadata.description:
A huge pack of Angry Birds-related flash games.

By now there are 72 SWF files.

If you get a white or a gray screen when opening some SWFs (eg. Angry Birds Cannon 3), just wait at least 1 minute and the game will load.

Full list of games included (the actual filenames are kept as they were, although the ones that had gibberish filenames have been changed):

Angry Birds Bomb
Angry Birds Take A Shower 2
Angry Birds Cannon
Angry Birds Cannon 2
Angry Birds Cannon 3
Angry Birds Bad Pig Game*
Angry Birds Bomb 2
Angry Birds Dentist
Angry Birds Differences
Angry Birds Ice Cream
Angry Birds Bike Revenge
Angry Birds Go Crazy
Angry Birds Kick Piggies
Angry Birds Rock Bird (doesn't work on Flash Player 32, needs an older version to work)
Angry Birds Slingshot Fun 2
Angry Birds Space Alien War
Angry Birds Counterattack
Angry Birds Drink Water
Angry Birds vs Zombies
Angry Birds Space Bike
Angry Birds Piggies Escape
Angry Birds Arms Bird
Angry Birds Huge
Angry Birds Bad Pigs
Angry Birds Balloon
Angry Birds Bomber Bird
Cannon Bird 1
Cannon Bird 2
Cannon Bird 3 (Angry Birds Cannon Collection 3)
Cannon Bird 3 (Chinese)
Cannon Bird 4 (Angry Duck Cannon)
Cannon Bird 5 (Angry Duck Cannon Space)
Angry Birds Space Cannon
Kick Out Green Pigs
Angry Birds HD 3.0
Angry Birds Protect Home
Angry Birds Hockey
Angry Birds Connect
Angry Birds Crazy Racing
Angry Birds Halloween
Angry Birds Matching
Angry Birds Online (GreenHD)
Angry Birds Online (GameTa.vn)
Angry Birds Online 3*
Angry Birds Pigs Out
Angry Birds Punisher
Angry Birds Rio
Angry Birds Rush Rush Rush
Angry Birds Shot
Angry Birds Space
Angry Birds Halloween Adventure
Naughty Angry Birds
Unfreeze Angry Birds
Angry Birds Space (gamelikeangrybirds.com)
Angry Birds Stella
Angry Pigs 2
Bad Piggies
Bad Piggies 2.0
Bad Piggies 3.0
Bad Piggies 3.4
Bad Piggies 3.8 Ground Hot Day
Bad Piggies 3.8 Sandbox (needs internet off to work)
Bad Piggies Online 2015*
Bad Piggies Online 2018
Bad Piggies Air Strike
Bad Piggies Stop Stop Stop
Bad Pig Defense
Crush Bad Piggie*
Bad Pig Perfect Couple
Bad Piggies Kart Racing
Heal Stella

(* asterisk means that the game doesn't work or it doesn't properly)

Most of the swf files are ripped from:

www.greenhd.net
www.gamelikeangrybirds.com
www.y8.com

If you're wondering why AB Hero Rescue isn't added, well, because Windows Defender
thinks it's a virus.
metadata.subject: Angry birds
flash
flash games
metadata.title: The Ultimate Angry Birds Flash Games Pack
